project_type: Next.js 15 monolithic grocery delivery app with planned Flutter mobile migration
build_system: npm for Next.js backend, Flutter SDK for mobile app
test_framework: Node.js built-in test runner (tsx --test tests/*.test.ts) for backend, flutter test for mobile
build_command: npm run build (runs prisma generate && next build)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'npx prisma validate' to check schema. 2. Run 'npm run build' for Next.js. 3. Run 'npm test' for backend tests. 4. Run 'cd mobile && flutter analyze && flutter test' for mobile. 5. Run 'cd mobile && flutter build apk --debug' for Android build.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/migrations/ - generated by prisma migrate dev. node_modules/.prisma/client/ - generated by prisma generate.
setup_instructions: 1. Install Flutter SDK. 2. npm install in root. 3. Set up .env from .env.example. 4. npx prisma generate.
environment_constraints: Flutter not pre-installed - must download and install. Java 25 available for Android builds. Node 22 available. Full internet access (OPEN_INTERNET). No real Firebase project - use placeholder configs. No PostgreSQL server running - schema validation only.
contribution_requirements: Keep existing Next.js admin/staff behavior functional. Never commit production secrets or Firebase private credentials. Use server-confirmed values for money calculations.

key_patterns.auth: NextAuth v5 beta with PrismaAdapter. Staff credentials + phone OTP + Google OAuth. JWT callbacks populate session with role, permissions, passwordVersion, authVersion. Invalid sessions return role=INVALID.
key_patterns.api_routes: Next.js App Router handlers in app/api/. Use auth() for session, Zod for validation, enforceRateLimit for rate limiting, writeAuditLog for audit trail.
key_patterns.delivery_lifecycle: ORDER_RECEIVED -> ACCEPTED -> PACKING -> READY_FOR_DELIVERY -> OUT_FOR_DELIVERY -> ARRIVING -> DELIVERED. Assignment via /api/admin/orders/[id]/delivery. Poll-based alert at /api/delivery/poll (returns unacknowledged assignments where deliveryAlertAckAt is null). SSE at /api/delivery/alerts (broken on Vercel). Completion requires: collection balance + OTP verification via /api/delivery/complete.
key_patterns.push: Web Push via VAPID keys. PushSubscription model stores endpoint, p256dh, auth. sendPushToUser in lib/push.ts. Auto-cleanup on 404/410 responses.
key_patterns.cart: Client-side localStorage cart (msm-cart-v1 key). CartItem has id, name, price, discountPrice, quantity. Server validates prices from DB during checkout.
key_patterns.money: All prices Decimal(10,2) in Prisma. Server-side authoritative calculations in lib/order-checkout.ts. Never trust client totals. DeliveryCollection tracks expected vs collected amounts.
key_patterns.order_assignment_flow: Admin PATCH /api/admin/orders/[id]/delivery with deliveryPartnerId. Sets deliveryAssignedAt, clears deliveryAlertAckAt, generates deliveryOtp. Sends SSE + push notification to partner. Partner acknowledges via POST /api/delivery/poll with orderId.

directory_structure: app/ - Next.js pages and API routes. app/api/ - REST endpoints (account, admin, auth, delivery, orders, etc.). components/ - React components (cart, delivery, checkout, UI). lib/ - shared utilities (auth, validation, push, OTP, distance, delivery logic). prisma/ - schema.prisma + migrations + seed.ts. tests/ - Node.js test files. public/ - PWA assets. docs/ - documentation.
